title: Refactor multi-anti-pattern form module
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/signup_form_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SignupFormLive). The form must: (1) use to_form with action :validate on change, (2) use <.form> and <.input>, (3) use used_input?/1 to suppress untouched-field errors, (4) NOT mutate the changeset with Map.put, (5) NOT store the "show_password_rules" toggle in socket assigns (use <details> or a hidden input), (6) handle the save with a proper {:ok, _} / {:error, changeset} branching using Ecto.Changeset.
tier_rationale: Requires applying six form-correctness rules simultaneously.
research_citation: John Elm Labs top-3 form mistakes
